perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top and a grey sweater draped over her shoulders, stands in front of the camera. (2) She speaks directly to the camera, using animated facial expressions and hand gestures, such as touching her hair, pointing to herself, and holding up fingers. (3) The background is a simple indoor setting with a wooden desk and blinds on a window.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese throughout the clip. (2) An upbeat, mid-tempo background track with electronic and percussion elements plays continuously. (3) The environment sounds like a quiet indoor space with minimal ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '🇰🇷韓國人幫你取韓文名字' (A Korean person helps you get a Korean name) appears at the top. (2) Call-to-Action Text: '現在底下留言報名 抽7位！下次會拍Reels回答' (Leave a comment below to sign up. 7 people will be chosen! Will answer in the next Reel) remains static at the bottom. (3) Emotional stickers and emojis are used within the text to convey a playful tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Explanation of Service -> Call to Action for Comments

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black turtleneck and a grey sweater over her shoulders.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist room featuring a wooden desk, a black chair, and a window with white blinds.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut at start and end

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to drive user engagement and build a community by offering a personalized interaction where the creator selects followers to receive custom Korean names. The use of 'Korean' in the hook leverages the creator's cultural expertise to provide value to her audience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct eye contact, frequent hand gestures, and high-density functional text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This is a classic 'call-to-comment' video typical of social media influencers looking to boost their algorithm ranking through high comment volume.
